name: Chinese Beef with Vegetables (Lf)
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces Round steak; trimmed of fat, cut diagonally into
recipeInstructions:
1 medium Onion -- chopped
1/4 teaspoon Ground ginger
2 cups Broccoli -- chopped
Carrots -- sliced
1 cup Beef stock
1 cup Snow peas
1/2 cup Water chestnuts -- drained and sliced
1/2 cup Bean sprouts
1 tablespoon Soy sauce
1 tablespoon Cornstarch
PER SERVING:
calories
mol of cholesterol
grams of dietary fiber
grams of fat
milligrams of sodium (analyses do not include the rice, which is an additional source)
Place oil and water in a large skillet or wok. Heat over medium-high heat.
Add meat and onion and brown lightly. Add remaining ingredients except soy sauce and cornstarch. Cover and cook until vegetables are just tender. Mix the soy sauce and cornstarch together to form a paste. Stir into the other ingredients and cook, stirring occasionally, until thickened. Serve with brown rice. Makes 4 servings.
